message:
feat(app): expose agent debug and selection REST endpoints

Building on the agent selection and debug query APIs added in c2c99b7, this
commit completes the external control interface by exposing two new REST
endpoints that enable external tools to query and manipulate agent state.

New REST Endpoints:
  • GET /api/agents/debug - Query agents with comprehensive filtering and sorting
  • POST /api/selection - Update agent selection state (replace/add/clear modes)

GET /api/agents/debug supports:
  - Filter by agent IDs (comma-separated list)
  - Filter by diet class (herbivore/omnivore/carnivore)
  - Filter by selection state (none/selected/focused)
  - Filter by brain kind (substring match)
  - Sort by energy or age (descending)
  - Limit result count

POST /api/selection enables:
  - Replace mode: clear all selections, then select specified agents
  - Add mode: add agents to existing selection
  - Clear mode: remove agents from selection
  - Returns 202 Accepted with queued confirmation

Implementation Details:
  • Created DTO layer in servers.rs to decouple REST from internal types
  • AgentDebugEntryDto flattens Position and IndicatorState for simpler JSON
  • SelectionUpdateRequestBody converts to core SelectionUpdate type
  • Added parse_id_list() helper for robust ID parsing with error handling
  • Updated OpenAPI schema with all new types and endpoints

Performance Optimization:
  • Boxed ScriptBotsConfig in ControlCommand::UpdateConfig enum variant
  • Large config struct now heap-allocated to reduce enum size
  • Avoids expensive stack copies when passing commands through channels

Code Quality Improvements:
  • Refactored if-let-filter chains to Rust 2024 let-chain syntax
  • More idiomatic pattern matching with early returns
  • Added #[allow(clippy::collapsible_if)] where nested ifs improve clarity
  • Made AgentDebugSort derive Default with #[default] attribute
  • Alphabetized slotmap imports (Key, KeyData, SecondaryMap, SlotMap)

Updated files:
  • crates/scriptbots-app/src/servers.rs (+209 -13)
  • crates/scriptbots-core/src/lib.rs (+32 -35)
  • crates/scriptbots-app/src/control.rs (+7 -4)
  • crates/scriptbots-render/src/lib.rs (+26 -27)
  • crates/scriptbots-app/src/terminal/mod.rs (+15 -16)
  • crates/scriptbots-app/tests/terminal_end_to_end.rs (+2 -1)

Example API usage:
  GET /api/agents/debug?diet=Carnivore&sort=energy&limit=10
  POST /api/selection {"mode":"Replace","agent_ids":[42,137],"state":"Selected"}

This completes the foundation for external agent manipulation, enabling
future integrations with debugging tools, data analysis scripts, and
interactive visualization systems.
